arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineup
arts.sum: Previewing Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona in the Champions League, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups & score prediction.

arts.ttl: Flick admits to doubts over Olmo and Iñigo for Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick admitted to having doubts about the participation of Dani Olmo and Iñigo Martínez in Tuesday’s Champions League quarter-final second leg against Borussia Dortmund. Flick was also asked if he’s willing to leave out Iñigo, who is at risk of a suspension for the first leg of the semis if he gets one more yellow card.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s coaching staff ‘immediatey congratulated’ one player after win over Leganés
arts.sum: A star member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was showered in deserved praise by the club’s coaching staff on the back of their most recent outing.…

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Garcia shock as huge Barcelona offer made
arts.sum: All the latest Arsenal transfer news in one place, including updates on Joan Garcia, Bukayo Saka and Ollie Watkins . We can also confirm that Man Utd are keen on top Arsenal goalkeeper target Joan Garcia.

arts.ttl: Barcelona youth talent ‘highly likely’ to be promoted to first-team by Hansi Flick next season
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick is giving serious consideration to drafting another member of the club’s academy setup into his squad for next season. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star to miss Copa del Rey final through injury
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona is in line to miss the upcoming Copa del Rey final. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who highlight…

arts.ttl: “I can’t give you a 100% answer’ - Flick on whether Ter Stegen could take over from Szczesny in UCL
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny is the current number one goalkeeper, but club captain Marc-André ter Stegen is back in training and could be medically cleared in time for the semi-finals if Barça get there. Szczesny has been amazing in goal and hasn’t lost a game yet, but Ter Stegen is the starter and club captain and Flick is a man who has respect for hierarchy as part of his process of managing a dressing room.

arts.ttl: Barca hit by Lewandowski injury scare ahead of Dortmund clash
arts.sum: The suggestion is that Lewandowski felt something, meaning the club may not risk him in a match where they will start 4-0 up from the first leg. We count on him a lot, and every day he shows what he’s capable of and has all the qualities that make him a good player.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star sparks injury fears ahead of Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Barcelona star Robert Lewandowski has on Monday evening sparked fears when it comes to his availability to face Borussia Dortmund tomorrow night. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who have provided…

arts.ttl: Barcelona youngster signs with Jay-Z’s ‘Roc Nation’ agency
